# local-docs-mcp

> Local documentation search for AI assistants, from Git repos and local directories

## Overview
- AI-driven documentation indexer for MCP-compatible assistants
- Indexes GitHub repos (sparse checkout) and local directories
- SQLite FTS5 full-text search with BM25 ranking
- Token budgeting for AI context windows
- Config files optional; primary workflow is AI-driven via add_docs

## MCP Tools
- search_docs: Full-text search across indexed documentation
- list_repos: List available documentation sources and indexing status
- browse_docs: Explore documentation tree structure
- update_docs: Re-index to pull latest changes
- add_docs: Add new documentation from git repos or local directories
- remove_docs: Remove an indexed documentation source

## CLI Commands
- stdio: Start MCP server on stdio (config optional)
- index: Index repos from config file
- search: Search indexed docs from command line
- list: List indexed repos
- update: Re-index repos
- remove: Remove a repo from the index
- browse: Navigate doc tree

## AI-Driven Workflow
1. list_repos to discover available docs
2. search_docs to find answers
3. browse_docs to explore structure
4. add_docs if needed docs are missing (research repo URL and doc paths first)
5. list_repos to check indexing progress
